chapter_title: About the Voluntary Prayer of Isha Prayer

hadith_entries.text:
595. Narrated Abdullah ibn Moghaffal
Prophet said: "There is a prayer between the two
azans (i.e. azan and iqama), there is a prayer between the
two azans." On the third time the Prophet added the
words: "It is optional to (perform the voluntary prayer
between them)."'Bukhari)
